A structured top handle with a distinctive round pouch that gently unfolds from a turnlock closure, the Demi is crafted from 100% Elaphe. Details: Snakeskin leather exterior and nappa leather interior Rose gold metal turnlock closure Single interior pocket Height: 5.5” Width: 7.75” Depth: 5” Handle height: 5” Made in Italy

products.title: Nina Bag in Black Crocodile Leather
products.description: The original handbag in the Gabriela Hearst collection, the Nina Bag is named for artist and activist Nina Simone. A structured top handle with a distinctive round pouch that gently unfolds from a turnlock closure, the Nina is crafted from smooth Italian Nappa leather. Details: Crocodile leather exterior and nappa leather interior Rose gold metal turnlock closure Single interior pocket Height: 6”

products.title: Patsy Bag in Green Crocodile Leather
products.description: The Patsy Bag is named after American country music singer Patsy Cline. The shape was inspired by the lunch boxes of women entering the work force during the 1940’s. Details: Crocodile leather exterior and nappa leather interior Rose gold metal flip-lock fastening closure Height: 5.5” Width: 7.25” Depth: 4” Handle height: 4” Made in Italy To speak to a staff member, contact us at sales@gabrielahea
